title: ceanothus verrucosus var. grandifolius
intro: Ceanothus verrucosus var. grandifolius, also known as the California lilac or mountain whitethorn, is a shrub native to the western United States and Canada, known for its fragrant white flowers and thorny stems. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ceanothus verrucosus var. grandifolius include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
